item.title: More Than Meets the Eye: NVIDIA RTX-Accelerated Computers Now Connect Directly to Apple Vision Pro
item.description: NVIDIA and Apple’s collaboration brings native integration of NVIDIA CloudXR 6.0 to visionOS, securely delivering NVIDIA RTX-powered simulators and professional 3D graphics applications — like Immersive for Autodesk VRED on Innoactive’s XR streaming solutions…
item.author: Nvidia.com

item.title: NVIDIA Launches RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPU
item.description: NVIDIA has added another graphics card to its server lineup, this time in the form of a passively cooled, single-slot RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPU. The company positions this release as a highly efficient GPU for compute-dense environments. It co…
item.author: Techpowerup.com

item.title: NVIDIA has unveiled DLSS 5 with real-time neural rendering
item.description: NVIDIA has announced DLSS 5 tech, coming this Fall to PC owners with an RTX 50-series GPU. The new tech is powered by AI just like the past versions
item.author: Android Headlines

item.title: System76 Introduces New Thelia Mira High Performance Desktop Series
item.description: System76 has refreshed its Thelio Mira desktop series with a focus on better thermals, easier serviceability, and a cleaner overall design, while it's still all built in-house at the company's facility in Denver. The new chassis mixes aluminium, steel, and a …
item.author: Techpowerup.com

item.title: HPE adds Blackwell, Rubin systems to Nvidia-backed sovereign AI push
item.description: Plus: Object storage gets stamp of approval, and it intros network linked 'AI Grid' HPE has expanded its Nvidia-based AI portfolio with new systems built on Blackwell and upcoming Rubin GPUs, alongside updates to its Alletra Storage MP X10000, which it claims…
item.author: Theregister.com

item.title: Bethesda promises Nvidia's controversial DLSS 5 AI filters will be "totally optional" for players - Eurogamer
item.description: Bethesda promises Nvidia's controversial DLSS 5 AI filters will be "totally optional" for playersEurogamer NVIDIA DLSS 5 Delivers AI-Powered Breakthrough In Visual Fidelity For GamesNVIDIA Nvidia faces gamer backlash over 'breakthrough' AI graphics featureBBC…
item.author: Slashdot.org

item.title: (PR) Supermicro Unveils NVIDIA BlueField-4 STX Storage Server
item.description: Supermicro, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for AI, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge, today unveiled one of the industry's first context memory (CMX) storage server as part of NVIDIA STX reference architecture announced NVIDIA GTC 2026. STX is a …
item.author: Techpowerup.com

item.title: “If DLSS 5 Was Shown as a Next-Gen Hardware Reveal and not AI, You Guys Would Be Going Nuts” – Game Dev Hits Back at Anti-AI Crowd - Wccftech
item.description: “If DLSS 5 Was Shown as a Next-Gen Hardware Reveal and not AI, You Guys Would Be Going Nuts” – Game Dev Hits Back at Anti-AI CrowdWccftech NVIDIA DLSS 5 Delivers AI-Powered Breakthrough In Visual Fidelity For GamesNVIDIA Nvidia faces gamer backlash over 'brea…
item.author: Slashdot.org

item.title: Gamers are right to be disgusted by NVIDIA's DLSS 5
item.description: You can sum up the gamer response to NVIDIA's DLSS 5 announcement with the ever-relevant Fallout 4 meme: "Everyone disliked that." Across social media and Reddit last night, I couldn't find anyone who's genuinely positive about the potential for DLSS 5, which…
item.author: Slashdot.org

item.title: Supermicro Among First to Unveil NVIDIA BlueField-4 STX Storage Server to Improve AI Inference Performance
item.description: Supermicro illustrates leadership with one of the first Context Memory (CMX) storage servers, built on the NVIDIA STX reference architecture for AI storage. The BlueField-4 STX storage server combines NVIDIA Vera CPU and NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC. Supermicro…
item.author: PR Newswire UK
